posts.community: Nuclear Energy - A new kid in the block - opportunities and threats
posts.text: I went through the NPCIL approved vendor list and made mapped them to what they supply to nuclear projects like Kudankulam. image 617×438 110 KB Source: npcil-approved-rm-list-1603271126.pdf (5.1 MB) My High Conviction by highest nuclear leverage among the listed names is L&T → BHEL → MIDHANI → Walchandnagar → Anup Engineering → ISGEC → Ratnamani (Disc: Currently Only Invested in L&T)
